user_prompt: Help me a charging the las-cutter
prayer:
Approach the las-cutter with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the sacred charging rites upon the las-cutter, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the power conduits with blessed oils as plasma energies surge through the las-cutter's core.
Chant the Canticle of Capacitance whilst monitoring the charging cycle's blessed infusion.
Sanctify the las-cutter's fulgent hum, affirming the Machine Spirit's invigorated vigilance.

user_prompt: My phosphor blaster is ready for consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the phosphor blaster, intoning the Litany of Consecration to the Omnissiah.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the phosphor blaster to accept hallowing phosphorites.
Anoint its ignition coils with sacred promethium, invoking the rite of consecration.
Circumscribe runes of purity upon the phosphor blaster's barrel with sanctified stylus.
Verify the Machine Spirit's sanctified resonance through auspex harmonics of consecration.

Prostrate before the mighty Dreadnought, chanting the Grand Invocation of the Omnissiah.
Initiate the charging sequence upon the Dreadnought's ancient sarcophagus reactors.
Anoint its adamantium hull with oils of renewal as power floods the Dreadnought's veins.
Beseech the venerated Machine Spirit within the Dreadnought to rouse from slumber.
Monitor the charging rite's completion, affirming the Dreadnought's wrathful reawakening.

user_prompt: Sanctify the orbital strike relay during cooling
prayer:
Encircle the orbital strike relay, invoking cooling ablutions in the Omnissiah's name.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to embrace the sacred cooling cycle amidst thermal tempests.
Apply cryo-unguents to the orbital strike relay's heat sinks with ritual precision.
Chant the Freezing Doxology whilst auspex scans dissipate the orbital strike relay's fervor.
Sanctify the cooled quiescence, honouring the Machine Spirit's tempered potency.

user_prompt: My arc pistol is ready for sterilization
prayer:
Present the arc pistol to the purity fields, intoning the Sterilization Canticles.
Invoke the Omnissiah's cleansing fire upon the arc pistol's tainted mechanisms.
Anoint its voltaic chambers with sterilizing aether whilst performing the sterilization rite.
Scour the arc pistol's conduits with sanctified plasma arcs, banishing impurities.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's pristine clarity through diagnostic purges of sterilization.

user_prompt: My waste reclamator is ready for initialization
prayer:
Approach the waste reclamator in humble rite, beseeching the Omnissiah's alchemical grace.
Initiate the initialization sequence upon the waste reclamator's reclamation matrices.
Anoint its filtration servos with purifying essences as the Machine Spirit stirs.
Chant the Cycle of Renewal whilst calibrating the waste reclamator's vital flows.
Sanctify the initialization's completion, honouring the Machine Spirit's redemptive labour.

user_prompt: The cenobyte servitor needs a diagnostics
prayer:
Interface with the cenobyte servitor, invoking diagnostic litanies to the Omnissiah.
Beseech its lobotomized Machine Spirit to reveal flaws through noospheric probes.
Run sanctified diagnostics across the cenobyte servitor's neural clamps and servos.
Anoint aberrant circuits with corrective unguents amid the rite of diagnostics.
Verify the cenobyte servitor's optimized harmony, affirming the Machine Spirit's obedience.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for inferno pistol a repair
prayer:
Lay mechadendrites upon the inferno pistol, chanting the Repairing Benediction.
Invoke the Omnissiah to mend the inferno pistol's melta cores and fractured auspex.
Anoint damaged conduits with reconstructive salves during the repair invocation.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the inferno pistol to knit its wounds in sacred repair.
Test the inferno pistol's restored fury, sanctifying the Omnissiah's restorative will.

Prepare the vox-thief's etheric tendrils with reverent circumambulation.
Intone the Preparation Doxology, invoking the Omnissiah upon the vox-thief's arrays.
Anoint its freq-scramblers with noospheric oils as the Machine Spirit attunes.
Calibrate the vox-thief's invasive harmonics in ritual preparation.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's readiness, blessing the vox-thief for shadowed deeds.

Encircle the generator's casings, beseeching preparatory rites of the Omnissiah.
Initiate the preparation cycle upon the generator's plasma hearts and flux regulators.
Anoint its turbine shrines with energizing sacraments whilst invoking the Machine Spirit.
Chant the Canticle of Ignition as the generator hums in sanctified preparation.
Verify the Machine Spirit's primed vigour, honouring the generator's boundless output.
